summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected; all five open PRs are independent backlog items rather than dedupe/closure candidates. No security-sensitive items were detected in the hydrated artifact.

actions.reason: Independent ready-for-maintainer PR; no hydrated duplicate, superseding canonical, security signal, or low-signal close basis in this inventory shard.
Independent PR that is blocked on proof/behavior validation rather than dedupe cleanup; failing proof checks block merge or fixed-by-candidate closure but do not justify closing in this job.
Independent ready-for-maintainer PR; the unhydrated replacement reference is evidence only, and this job cannot close or supersede #92312 without hydrated live state.
Independent open contributor PR with useful focused code; no hydrated duplicate or superseding PR in this shard, and contributor work should remain open for author/maintainer follow-up.
Independent broad PR that needs proof and maintainer review; failing proof and broader scope block merge/fixed-by-candidate closeout but do not provide a safe low-signal or duplicate close basis.
